name: Spaghetti Al Pomodoro e Basilico
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, peel, and chop the tomatoes, discarding seeds.
2. Heat oil in a moderately deep pan.
3. Add onion and garlic; sauté until onion is limp.
4. Discard garlic.
5. Add chopped tomatoes, basil, salt, and pepper.
6. Simmer for about 20 minutes over moderate heat.
7. While simmering, bring a large pot of water to boil.
8. Add spaghetti to the boiling water and cook "al dente" (approximately 8-10 minutes).
9. Drain the spaghetti.
10. Toss the cooked spaghetti with the sauce and grated Parmesan cheese.
11. Garnish each plate with basil leaves.
12. Serve immediately.
